nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Heilwig, Helwig (female and male), composed of the ancient Germanic elements heil ‘luck’ + wīg ‘war’.

variants.name: Hellwig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Kurt, Otto, Bernhard, Juergen, Jutta, Oskar, Wolfgang.

variants.name: Helvig
meanings: Danish: from the personal name Helvig, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hel ‘luck’ + wīg ‘war’. Compare German Helwig .
Norwegian: habitational name from a farm name in southwestern Norway and Agder, most likely a compound of Old Norse hella ‘flat stone, flat mountain’ and vík ‘bay, inlet’.

variants.name: Halbig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wolfgang, Alois, Bernhard.
German: from the medieval personal name Heilwig, Helwig (see Helwig ).

variants.name: Helbig
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Franz, Hans, Heinz, Kurt, Erna, Ernst, Erwin, Gunther, Jutta, Manfred, Otto, Rudi.
German: from the medieval personal name Heilwig, Helwig (see Helwig ).
